name: @jmaconny/draftforge
description: Local-first tool for preparing social carousel draft packs from photos, videos, and optional music. Draft-only: never publishes or schedules.

scripts.test:draftforge: node --test tests/draftforge-manifest-contract.test.js tests/draftforge-source-providers.test.js tests/draftforge-render-cards.test.js tests/draftforge-audio-modes.test.js tests/draftforge-pack-output.test.js tests/draftforge-mbs-safety.test.js tests/draftforge-config.test.js tests/draftforge-doctor.test.js tests/draftforge-package-boundary.test.js tests/draftforge-skill-install.test.js
